errors.field-not-available-in-cross-db: This field is not available in cross-database search. Please specify a single database.

errors.invalid-operator-for-field: Invalid operator for the specified field.

meta.title: Submission Guide | DB Portal (仮)
meta.description: Find the right DDBJ submission service (BioProject / BioSample / DRA / MSS / NSSS / GEA / JGA) based on the data you want to submit.

hero.title: Submission Guide
hero.subtitle: Find the right DDBJ submission service based on the data you want to submit.

microbial.title: Microbial genome
microbial.description: Genome submission for prokaryotes, viruses, organelles, and plasmids

eukaryote.title: Eukaryotic genome
eukaryote.description: Genome submission for animals, plants, and fungi (incl. Haplotype / TSA / EST / TPA)

expression.title: Gene expression
expression.description: RNA-seq, microarray, and other expression profiling data

human-restricted.title: Human restricted access
human-restricted.description: Human data with re-identification risk (requires NBDC approval)

questions.root: Is this human data with re-identification risk?

detail.threeLayerDescription: Genome submission is a three-layer process: metadata (BioProject + BioSample) → raw reads (DRA) → assembly (MSS / NSSS). Each layer is submitted independently and linked by BioProject / BioSample accessions.
detail.threeLayerLayer3: Layer 3: Assembly — DDBJ (Trad) via MSS / NSSS

empty.title: Select a use case to see the details
empty.description: Choose a card above or follow the Decision Tree. The submission destination details will appear in this area.

placeholder.title: Detail page is in preparation
placeholder.description: The leaf-specific submission steps and prerequisites will be added in a later phase. For now, please refer to the parent card's overview.

microbial.summary: Genome submission for microbes (prokaryotes, viruses, organelles, plasmids). Follows the three-layer structure (metadata → raw reads → assembly). Prokaryotic genomes can be annotated automatically with DFAST.
microbial.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, public key, pre-registered BioProject + BioSample

eukaryote.summary: Genome submission for eukaryotes (animals, plants, fungi). Includes special cases: Haplotype (diploid umbrella + Principal + Alternate), de novo transcriptome (TSA), single-pass cDNA (EST), and third-party annotation (TPA).
eukaryote.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, public key, pre-registered BioProject + BioSample, locus_tag prefix is mandatory

metagenome.summary: Environmental sample and metagenome-derived data. Five branches: raw reads only, Primary (pre-binning contigs), genome bin (MAG / Binned / SAG), OTU profile (TLS), and metatranscriptome (meta-TSA).
metagenome.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, public key, pre-registered BioProject + BioSample

expression.summary: Gene expression data (RNA-seq, microarray). Submitted to GEA. NGS-derived data goes to DRA + GEA; microarray to GEA only.

variation.summary: SNP / structural variant calling results. Submission destination depends on organism (human / non-human) and variant type (SNP / SV): DDBJ-run JVar, or EBI-run EVA / dgVa.
variation.commonRequirements: Account for each submission service (JVar / EVA / dgVa)

proteomics.summary: LC-MS/MS proteome data. Submitted to jPOST (external).

metabolomics.summary: Metabolomics data from LC-MS / GC-MS. Submitted to MetaboBank.

small-sequence.summary: Sequences fewer than 100 entries and shorter than 500 kb in total. Submitted directly via NSSS without BioProject or BioSample.

human-restricted.summary: Human data with re-identification risk. Requires NBDC data-sharing approval and is submitted to JGA.
human-restricted.commonRequirements: NBDC Human Database data-sharing approval, JGA submission account

bioproject.title: BioProject
bioproject.description: Register the project on D-way and obtain an accession (PRJDB*)

biosample.title: BioSample
biosample.description: Register sample info on D-way and link to the BioProject

dra.title: DRA
dra.description: Upload raw sequence data (FASTQ / BAM) to DRA

mss.title: MSS
mss.description: Submit assembled sequences and annotations through the MSS form

mss.title: MSS
mss.description: Submit assembled sequences and annotations through the MSS form

dra.title: DRA
dra.description: Upload raw sequence data (FASTQ / BAM) to DRA

draAnalysis.title: DRA (Analysis)
draAnalysis.description: Upload analysis output (pre-binning contigs etc.) to DRA Analysis

gea.title: GEA
gea.description: Submit expression data (Series / Sample / Raw files) to GEA

gea.title: GEA
gea.description: Submit array raw data and processed data to GEA (DRA is not required)

metabobank.title: MetaboBank
metabobank.description: Submit IDF + SDRF metadata, raw data, and MAF to MetaboBank

umbrella.title: Umbrella BioProject
umbrella.description: Register the umbrella BioProject that groups the haplotypes

principalAlternate.title: Principal / Alternate BioProject
principalAlternate.description: Register Principal and Alternate BioProjects linked to the umbrella

biosample.title: BioSample
biosample.description: Register a single BioSample shared across haplotypes

mss.title: MSS
mss.description: Set locus_tag prefix with haplotype suffix and submit via MSS

umbrella.title: Umbrella BioProject
umbrella.description: Register the umbrella BioProject that groups the haplotypes

principalAlternate.title: Principal / Alternate BioProject
principalAlternate.description: Register Principal and Alternate BioProjects linked to the umbrella

biosample.title: BioSample
biosample.description: Register a single BioSample shared across haplotypes

mss.title: MSS
mss.description: Set locus_tag prefix with haplotype suffix and submit via MSS

login.title: NSSS login
login.description: Open NSSS with your DDBJ Account

form.title: Web form
form.description: Enter sequences and annotations via the NSSS web form

review.title: Curation
review.description: DDBJ staff review the submission and handle queries

dbcls.title: DBCLS approval
dbcls.description: Submit a data-sharing plan to humandbs.dbcls.jp and obtain approval

guidance.title: JGA team guidance
guidance.description: After approval, contact the DDBJ JGA team to begin submission

upload.title: Metadata + data upload
upload.description: Write XML metadata and upload real data (BAM / FASTQ / VCF etc.)

submit.title: Submit to jPOST directly
submit.description: Visit the jPOST site and follow their submission procedure

submit.title: Submit to JVar SNP
submit.description: Register SNP / Indel data on the JVar SNP site

submit.title: Submit to JVar SV
submit.description: Register structural variant data on the JVar SV site

submit.title: Submit to EVA
submit.description: Register non-human SNP / Indel data on EBI's EVA

submit.title: Submit to dgVa
submit.description: Register non-human structural variants on EBI's dgVa

genome.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, SSH public key, sequence file (FASTA), annotation (tab-delimited), NGS raw data (FASTQ / BAM), MD5

gea.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, processed data, raw data, MD5

nsss.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, sequence data, annotation info

metabobank.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, SSH public key, IDF + SDRF metadata, raw data, processed data, MAF, MD5

jga.commonRequirements: DDBJ Account, DBCLS human data approval, real data (BAM / FASTQ / VCF etc.), JGA XML metadata

external.commonRequirements: Account for the destination service (issued by the external site)

human-restricted.summary: Human data with re-identification risk that needs NBDC approval. BAM / FASTQ / VCF files are submitted to JGA.

proteomics.summary: LC-MS/MS proteome data. DDBJ does not handle this type; submit it to jPOST via the external service.

metabolomics.summary: LC-MS / GC-MS metabolomics data. Submitted to MetaboBank with IDF + SDRF metadata and MAF.

variation-human-snp.summary: Human SNP / Indel (≤ 50 bp). Submitted to DDBJ-operated JVar SNP.

variation-human-sv.summary: Human structural variants (> 50 bp, SV). Submitted to DDBJ-operated JVar SV.

variation-nonhuman-snp.summary: Non-human SNP / Indel. Submitted to EBI's EVA.

variation-nonhuman-sv.summary: Non-human structural variants. Submitted to EBI's dgVa.

expression-ngs.summary: NGS-based RNA-seq and related expression data. Raw reads go to DRA, processed data to GEA.

expression-array.summary: Microarray experiment data. Submitted to GEA without using DRA.

small-sequence.summary: Small-scale sequences (fewer than 100 entries and under 500 kb). Submitted via NSSS without BioProject / BioSample.

metagenome-raw.summary: Raw sequencing reads from environmental samples. FASTQ files are uploaded to DRA.

metagenome-primary.summary: Pre-binning contigs (primary metagenome). MSS is not needed; submit to DRA Analysis.

metagenome-genome-bin.summary: Per-organism genomes reconstructed from the environment (MAG / Binned / SAG). Assemblies are submitted via MSS.

metagenome-tls.summary: Targeted locus study such as 16S rRNA. Submitted via MSS as TLS.

metagenome-tsa.summary: Environment-derived gene expression (metatranscriptome). Submitted via MSS as TSA.

organelle-plasmid.summary: Genomes of organelles (mitochondria, chloroplasts etc.) and plasmids. Submitted via MSS as GNM.

prokaryote-raw.summary: Prokaryote (bacteria / archaea) genome with raw reads only. Submitted to DRA.

prokaryote-raw-assembly.summary: Prokaryote genome with raw reads plus assembly. Raw reads go to DRA, assembly to MSS. DFAST can auto-annotate.

prokaryote-assembly-only.summary: Prokaryote genome with assembly only. Submit sequences + annotations via MSS.

virus-raw.summary: Virus / phage raw reads only. Submitted to DRA.

virus-raw-assembly.summary: Virus genome with raw reads plus assembly. Submit to DRA and MSS. SARS-CoV-2 can use DFAST_VRL for auto-annotation.

virus-assembly-only.summary: Virus genome, assembly only. Submit via MSS. Segmented viruses (influenza etc.) need one entry per segment.

eukaryote-tsa.summary: Eukaryote de novo transcriptome assembly (TSA). Submit to DRA + MSS (TSA).

eukaryote-tpa.summary: Third-party annotation (TPA assembly / specialist_db). A peer-reviewed publication is mandatory.

eukaryote-raw.summary: Eukaryote genome with raw reads only. Submitted to DRA.

eukaryote-raw-assembly.summary: Eukaryote genome with raw reads plus assembly. Submit to DRA and MSS. BioSample package and qualifiers differ for animals / plants / fungi.

eukaryote-assembly-only.summary: Eukaryote genome, assembly only. Submit via MSS.

eukaryote-haplotype-raw-assembly.summary: Diploid haplotype distinction (Principal / Alternate) with raw reads plus assembly. Uses the umbrella + Principal + Alternate 3-BioProject structure.

eukaryote-haplotype-assembly-only.summary: Haplotype distinction with assembly only. Submit via MSS using the umbrella + Principal + Alternate structure.

eukaryote-est-small.summary: Sanger single-pass cDNA at small scale (< 100 entries). Submit directly via NSSS.

eukaryote-est-large.summary: Sanger single-pass cDNA at large scale. Submit via BioProject + BioSample + MSS EST category.
